# 0 - "exp2 unary random vectors"
vpuOp exp2
numLanes 16
vecA 4095 40C2 410A BFA3 40EF 4023 C0C8 4095 4097 C0D5 C107 C064 C117 4074 C11E C0D7
vecB 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000
exp  41CA 4286 43C5 3ED4 4331 40BB 3C57 41CA 41D3 3C22 3B3D 3DAD 3ABD 4161 3A8C 3C1C
